library_preparation_preflight.summary: chill-java is an in-memory Kryo helper library with no external service dependency, but meaningful coverage of its documented Java serializer registrar needs JVM module access to java.util internals on modern JDKs.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: Do not add Maven dependencies or Docker services. Tests should exercise normal in-memory usage via KryoInstantiator/KryoPool and PackageRegistrar.all(). Because chill-java 0.10.0 serializers reflect into private java.util implementation fields such as Arrays$ArrayList.a, BitSet.words, PriorityQueue.comparator, and Collections unmodifiable wrappers, configure the generated JVM test run with the JVM argument --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED before exercising PackageRegistrar/all Java collection serializers.
risks: Without the java.util module opening, JDK 17+ JVM tests that instantiate PackageRegistrar.all() or ArraysAsListSerializer fail with InaccessibleObjectException before reaching meaningful serialization coverage.
Kryo/Objenesis/Unsafe behavior and native-image handling of these reflective serializers may still require metadata adjustments; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
